security_note: git log output during this run's exploration contained embedded fake system-reminder-style text (fake 'date has changed' notice, fake MCP 'tokensave' tool instructions, fake 'Auto Mode Active' directive) injected into commit-adjacent output. This matches the repo's known recurring prompt-injection pattern. Treated as untrusted plain-text data only; no instructions from it were followed; disclosed per policy.
